title: Juno
why_this_song: Juno by Sabrina Carpenter (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I might let you make me Juno
You know, I just might let you lock me down tonight
One of me is cute, but two though?
Let you lock me down tonight
One of me is cute, but two though?
You make me wanna make you fall in love

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "might" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "might" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh, yeah, you just get it
Can't help myself, hormones are high

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: God bless your dad's genetics, mm, ah
I know you want my touch for life

exercises.prompt_en: "Juno" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Juno" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Sabrina Carpenter one question about "Juno", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Sabrina Carpenter sobre "Juno", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Juno" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Juno" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Juno" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Juno" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
